known_issues: Most buttons are non-functional except those in the 'Connect with Us' section

existing_features.title: Fix all non-functional buttons across the site — including the Navigation smooth-scroll links, the HeroSection CTA button (scroll to subsidiaries), the WelcomePopup enter button, any interactive cards or buttons in AssuredToursSection, LuminiaCapturesSection, LuminiaTechLabsSection, ComingSoonSection, GSTServicesSection, SubsidiaryGrid, and SubsidiaryDetails — so that each button performs its intended action when clicked. Buttons in the 'Connect with Us' section (Footer email and WhatsApp links) are already working and must not be changed.

projectName: Fix non-functional buttons across all sections
